title: viola hirta subsp. sciaphila
intro: Viola hirta subsp. sciaphila, also known as the "scilla violet," is a subspecies of the hairy violet plant, belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola hirta subsp. sciaphila include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory tract irritation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
